Code verification confirms: ignore_default_args has 3 entries (--enable-automation, --disable-extensions, --disable-component-extensions-with-background-pages), chrome_args does NOT have --disable-default-apps or --disable-sync, profile logging includes cookies_present and extensions_dir, window_manager has MAX_RETRIES=3, setup_profile.bat exists in release.

seed_data_creation: Multiple test scenarios: 3-credit lifecycle (3→2→1→0), single credit abort test. Board locked after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 verified the NEW Chrome profile/extension fixes. KEY CHANGES VERIFIED: 1) ignore_default_args now has 3 entries: --enable-automation, --disable-extensions, --disable-component-extensions-with-background-pages. This preserves operator-installed Chrome extensions. 2) chrome_args cleaned: --disable-default-apps, --disable-sync, --disable-translate removed. 3) Profile content logging added: logs cookies_present and extensions_dir status on browser launch. 4) window_manager.py has MAX_RETRIES=3 retry logic for finding kiosk window. 5) NEW setup_profile.bat script exists in release for operators to prepare Chrome profile before first kiosk use. On Linux preview env without Chrome, observer fails with 'Chromium distribution chrome not found' - this is EXPECTED. All APIs work correctly, session-end chain verified.
